mission.title: argo-workflows: Cannot use `workflow.parameters` to set Workflow metadata?
mission.description: Cannot use `workflow.parameters` to set Workflow metadata?. This issue affects 27+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo-workflows troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo-workflows deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
Workflow templates that attempt to set metadata labels using workflow parameters (e.g., `jobId: "{{workflow.parameters.job_id}}"`) fail because parameter substitution does not occur in the metadata section.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Cannot use `workflow.parameters` to set Workflow metadata?
steps.description:
Use `spec.workflowMetadata` with `labelsFrom` to set workflow labels from parameters. Labels are updated on the first reconciliation:
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: render-
spec:
  workflowMetadata:
    labelsFrom:
      job-id:
        expression: workflow.parameters["job_id"]
  arguments:
    parameters:
    - name: job_id
      value: my-job-123
```

steps.title: Confirm Cannot use `workflow.parameters` to set Workflow… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Refactored spec.workflowMetadata and added labelsFrom/annotationsFrom fields. Workflow labels are now updated on first reconciliation using expressions that reference workflow parameters.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  generateName: render-
  labels:
    jobId: "{{workflow.parameters.job_id}}"

apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: CronWorkflow
metadata:
  name: asd
  namespace: argo

spec:
  # ...
  workflowMetadata:
    labels:
      example-parameter-from-label: {{workflow.parameters.my-param-label}}
      my-generally-defined-uuid: {{workflow.uid}}

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
